rationale: The exact official MTA Q15A row establishes that the historical Q15A route ended on June 29, 2025 and was discontinued. The row requires a distinct historical Q15A canonical route because no current canonical route safely identifies Q15A. Alternative-service and navigation language is retained as context only. The terminal lifecycle event is intentionally excluded from study projection and must not produce an operational occurrence.

study_disposition.reason: historical route service ended in the 2025 Queens Bus Network Redesign and has no current GTFS route anchor

clauses.source_quote: For service on 150 St, take the Q15. For service along 154 St, take the new Q61 .
clauses.review_rationale: Alternative-service guidance only; Q15 and Q61 are not route scope for the Q15A terminal event.

clauses.source_quote: Get more details on Q15 service.
